sourcingNote: Hex colors confirmed from official SVG logo. RGB and CMYK confirmed from official NFL Media Guide. Pantone confirmed by logo slick.
description: The Minnesota Vikings are an NFL franchise based in Minneapolis, Minnesota, founded in 1960. They play at U.S. Bank Stadium and compete in the NFC North. The Vikings are one of just four teams in NFL history to appear in four Super Bowls, and they are known for their passionate fanbase and a legacy of offensive excellence going back to Fran Tarkenton and, later, Randy Moss.
